role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script identification (Bengali) and language distribution.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain (alluvial), climate, and settlement density.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure, vehicle types (CNGs), and signage.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues like wiring styles and building materials.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified the country. The tournament logic correctly prioritized the specific combination of Bengali script and green CNGs to distinguish Bangladesh from India.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Bengali script visible on signs.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described flat terrain and vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly identified green CNGs and overhead wiring.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly noted corrugated metal roofing and concrete structures.
